title: pimpinella rossii
intro: Pimpinella rossii, also known as Zereshk or dried berries of the Zereshk plant, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Iran, particularly the province of Kerman. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella rossii include its potential to help manage diabetes, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Pimpinella rossii is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and dried berry capsules, and is often consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal benefits.
